examples: Many say they find Ulan Ude to be Asian-friendly.
The journey from Irkutsk to Ulan Bator got off to an alarming start.
A 131-foot-tall statue of Genghis Khan sits on the steppes outside Ulan Bator.
Here, in this Ottawa winter, it is dismayingly easy to recall claims that Canada's capital city is the coldest after Ulan Bator.
The Mongolian stock exchange, located in a lovely old cinema in Ulan Bator, has been transformed into a meeting place for international bankers.
